data.value: Three-time champions in four years after sweeping Phoenix 4-0 in the 2025 Finals. A'ja Wilson's fourth MVP. Won 16 straight games to close the 2025 season. Organizational culture built for winning.
Star Napheesa Collier underwent surgery on both ankles and is expected to miss 4-6 months, significantly clouding the Lynx's title hopes despite being co-favorites.

Caitlin Clark returning fully healthy after missing significant time with injury in 2025. Fever explicitly targeting a championship in year three. Aliyah Boston named Unrivaled Defensive Player of the Year.

Head coach Sandy Brondello fired after first-round 2025 exit. Stars Breanna Stewart, Jonquel Jones, and Sabrina Ionescu all entered free agency simultaneously — the most uncertain offseason of any contender.
The 2026 WNBA season faces an existential threat as the CBA has expired and a new deal has not been agreed upon. The season itself may be delayed or in jeopardy.
The expansion team made the playoffs in their first WNBA season, an impressive achievement, and enter 2026 at +3000 looking to build on surprising success.
